sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Dow Inc. (DOW) Stock Falls Amid Market Uptick: What Investors Need to Know
feed.summary: Dow Inc. (DOW) stock experienced a 1.13% decline, closing at $27.94, even as major market indices like the S&P 500, Dow, and Nasdaq saw gains. Despite this daily drop, Dow Inc. shares had achieved a 22.5% increase over the past month, outperforming both the Basic Materials sector and the S&P 500. Investors are anticipating the company's Q4 2025 earnings report on January 29, 2026, with analysts forecasting a revenue decrease and negative earnings per share for the full fiscal year.

feed.title: Canadian oil stocks: Suncor named top pick by CIBC and RBC
feed.summary: Canadian oil stocks experienced a volatile start to 2026 due to uncertainties surrounding Venezuelan production and geopolitical events in Iran. Despite varied market movements, both RBC Capital Markets and CIBC Capital Markets have named Suncor Energy as a top pick among Canadian integrated oil producers, citing a more stable underlying landscape for fourth-quarter estimates. RBC also favors Canadian Natural Resources among non-integrated senior producers, while CIBC highlights Kelt Exploration and Tamarack Valley Energy.

feed.title: AnaptysBio (NASDAQ:ANAB) Stock Price Down 7.3% - Time to Sell?
feed.summary: AnaptysBio (NASDAQ:ANAB) shares fell 7.3% despite a surprise quarterly beat and a $100 million share buyback authorization. The company remains unprofitable, with analysts forecasting negative EPS for the current fiscal year, and insiders have sold a significant number of shares recently. Analysts currently rate the stock a "Moderate Buy" with an average target price of $60.40.

feed.title: Mexican silver mine changes hands in $40M deal with bonus payouts
feed.summary: Endeavour Silver (NYSE: EXK) has completed the sale of its Bolañitos silver-gold mine to Guanajuato Silver for an upfront consideration of US$40 million, comprising US$30 million in cash and US$10 million in Guanajuato Silver shares. The deal also includes provisions for two contingent payments of US$5 million each, tied to future production milestones of silver-equivalent ounces from the mine. This divestiture allows Endeavour Silver to focus on its core silver assets and strategic growth initiatives.

feed.title: FDA tells Sanofi, GSK, AZ and CSL to include warnings for febrile seizures on flu shot labels
feed.summary: The FDA has mandated that Sanofi, AstraZeneca, GSK, and CSL Seqirus add warnings about the risk of febrile seizures to the labels of six of their flu vaccines. This decision follows postmarketing observational studies conducted by the FDA's Biologics Effectiveness and Safety System (BEST) which showed an increased risk of febrile seizures in children aged 6 months to 4 years within the first day of vaccination. The companies have 30 days to comply, propose changes, or rebut the findings, amidst increased scrutiny on vaccine policies and recent changes to childhood immunization schedules by the CDC.

feed.title: Daniel Asher Buys 57,809 Shares of Sequans Communications (NYSE:SQNS) Stock
feed.summary: Major shareholder Daniel Asher recently increased his stake in Sequans Communications (NYSE:SQNS) by purchasing 57,809 shares at an average price of $5.51 per share, following other acquisitions earlier in January. This transaction, totaling over $318,000, raised his total holdings to 1,789,487 shares, representing a 3.34% ownership increase. The company's stock is trading at $5.59, with a market capitalization of $80.03 million, and analysts have a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with a target price of $10.83.

feed.title: Woodside Energy Group Ltd (NYSE:WDS) Short Interest Up 96.4% in December
feed.summary: Woodside Energy Group Ltd (NYSE:WDS) experienced a significant 96.4% increase in short interest during December, reaching 4,255,920 shares. This corresponds to a days-to-cover ratio of 3.3 days, with approximately 0.2% of the company's stock currently shorted. Analyst ratings are mixed, with a "Moderate Buy" consensus from MarketBeat, despite a recent downgrade to "sell" by Wall Street Zen and a "hold" from Weiss Ratings.

feed.title: Halper Sadeh LLC Encourages WEBTOON Entertainment Inc. Shareholders to Contact the Firm to Discuss Their Rights
feed.summary: Halper Sadeh LLC, an investor rights law firm, is investigating potential breaches of fiduciary duties by officers and directors of WEBTOON Entertainment Inc. (NASDAQ: WBTN). The firm encourages long-term shareholders to contact them to discuss possible corporate governance reforms, recovery of funds, or other benefits. Shareholder involvement is emphasized as a way to improve company practices and enhance shareholder value.

feed.title: Boston Scientific set to re-enter neurovascular market with Penumbra acquisition
feed.summary: Boston Scientific announced its acquisition of Penumbra for approximately $14.5 billion, marking its re-entry into the neurovascular market. This strategic move aims to expand Boston Scientific's vascular offerings with Penumbra's comprehensive portfolio of devices for treating cardiovascular diseases, stroke, and aneurysms. The acquisition is expected to be completed in 2026 and will initially be dilutive to Boston Scientific's adjusted earnings per share.

feed.title: Insider Sell: D Bidzos Sells 9,000 Shares of VeriSign Inc (VRSN)
feed.summary: D Bidzos, Executive Chairman, President, and CEO of VeriSign Inc (VRSN), recently sold 9,000 shares, reducing his total holdings to 412,099 shares. This transaction is part of a larger trend of insider selling at VeriSign, with 44 insider sells and 2 insider buys over the past year. VeriSign's stock is currently trading at $248.45, indicating it is fairly valued according to its GF Value.

feed.title: John Hennessy Sells 600 Shares of Alphabet (NASDAQ:GOOG) Stock
feed.summary: John Hennessy, a director at Alphabet (NASDAQ:GOOG), sold 600 shares of the company's stock on January 13th for a total of $202,512, reducing his holding by 2.75%. The transaction, disclosed in an SEC filing, occurred as Alphabet stock was trading around $333, with a market capitalization of $4.02 trillion. The article also highlights recent positive catalysts like Apple's adoption of Google's Gemini, alongside ongoing legal and operational challenges for the tech giant.

feed.title: Insider Selling: Aeva Technologies (NASDAQ:AEVA) CFO Sells 60,000 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: Aeva Technologies CFO Saurabh Sinha sold 60,000 shares of AEVA stock for approximately $1.24 million on January 15, significantly reducing his stake. This sale follows several others since November, totaling over 146,000 shares, while the company trades near $19.82 with a negative EPS and market cap of $1.19 billion. Analyst consensus for AEVA is currently a "Hold" rating with an average price target of $26.50.

feed.title: Truist expands equipment finance ops with new head of structured credit
feed.summary: Truist Financial Corp. has appointed Mark Cuccinello as head of structured credit to oversee asset-based lending, working capital solutions, and equipment finance. Cuccinello, previously from JPMorgan Chase, will advance Truist’s structured-credit strategy by collaborating with corporate and commercial banking teams. This appointment underscores Truist's commitment to investing in its wholesale banking platform and delivering sophisticated financial solutions.

feed.title: Aeva Technologies CFO Sinha sells $1.23m in stock
feed.summary: Aeva Technologies CFO Saurabh Sinha sold 59,300 shares of company stock across three transactions on January 15, 2026, totaling approximately $1.23 million. Following these sales, Sinha directly holds 627,756 shares. The article also highlights Aeva's recent technological advancements in AI data centers and autonomous vehicle LiDAR sensors.

feed.title: Major Investor Shakes Up Sharps Technology With Notable Stock Sale
feed.summary: Saba Capital Management, L.P., a major investor, has reduced its stake in Sharps Technology, Inc. (STSS) by selling 107,465 shares for $240,009. This sale follows recent governance concerns, including the resignation of an independent director due to potential conflicts of interest related to the company's digital asset treasury strategy and the involvement of executives' family members. These issues are contributing to a "sell-leaning technical sentiment" for the stock.

feed.title: Xcel Energy plans another round of power shutoffs impacting thousands of northern Colorado residents
feed.summary: Xcel Energy announced plans for another round of public safety power shutoffs (PSPS) in northern Colorado on Friday, affecting nearly 9,000 customers in Larimer and Weld counties due to extremely dry conditions and high fire danger. The utility's meteorologists have been monitoring the weather, and Xcel Energy communicated the impending shutoffs to strategic partners 74 hours out and to customers around 48 hours in advance. Local organizations like Serve 6.8 are preparing to assist vulnerable residents, while some community members, like Mark Waldo, are already prepared with generators.

feed.title: GE HealthCare Stock Under the Microscope: Solid Gains, Soft Momentum and a Cautiously Bullish Wall S
feed.summary: GE HealthCare has shown strong performance over the past year but its stock momentum has softened recently, leading to a nuanced decision for investors. Analysts generally hold a cautiously bullish stance, with price targets indicating moderate upside. The company's future performance hinges on global healthcare spending, the adoption of its digital ecosystem, and margin expansion.

feed.title: Is Amgen (AMGN) Still Attractive After A 26% One Year Share Price Gain
feed.summary: Amgen (AMGN) has seen a 26.5% share price increase over the last year, prompting a valuation analysis to determine its current attractiveness. A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) model suggests the stock is undervalued by 48.1% with an estimated intrinsic value of $636.19 per share. Furthermore, its P/E ratio of 25.37x is below its "Fair Ratio" of 27.23x, also indicating undervaluation, although investor sentiment is split between bullish and bearish narratives concerning future growth and market challenges.

feed.title: RBC Capital Sticks to Its Buy Rating for S&P Global (SPGI)
feed.summary: RBC Capital analyst Ashish Sabadra maintained a Buy rating on S&P Global (SPGI) with a price target of $620.00. The company's shares closed yesterday at $542.16. S&P Global recently reported strong quarterly results, with revenue of $3.89 billion and a net profit of $1.09 billion for the quarter ending September 30.

feed.title: Is Parker-Hannifin (PH) Pricing In Too Much After Strong Multi‑Year Share Gains
feed.summary: Parker-Hannifin (PH) has seen significant share gains, but a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests the stock is currently overvalued by approximately 39.3%. Its P/E ratio of 32.74x also indicates it's expensive compared to its proprietary "Fair Ratio" of 30.16x, raising questions about whether its recent performance is fully priced into the stock. The article recommends further investigation using valuation tools to assess its true worth.

feed.title: A Look At Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings (NCLH) Valuation After Recent Earnings Results
feed.summary: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings (NCLH) recently reported annual revenue of US$9.7 billion and net income of US$663.5 million. Despite a 13.5% decline in its one-year total shareholder return, the stock is considered undervalued by many analysts, with a fair value estimate of US$27.93 compared to its current price of US$22.87. This narrative is supported by expectations of improved cost discipline, higher margins, and future EPS growth from new capacity, though risks like high leverage and euro-denominated debt exist.

feed.title: Watts Water Technologies, Inc. Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Earnings Release and Earnings Conference Call
feed.summary: Watts Water Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: WTS) will host a webcast on Thursday, February 12, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. EST to discuss its Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 financial results. The company will release these results after market close on Wednesday, February 11, 2026. Interested parties can access the webcast and an archived version on the Investor Relations section of the company's website, www.watts.com.

feed.title: |Armstrong World Industries Appoints New CEO, Market Cap Nearly Quadrupled
feed.summary: |Armstrong World Industries has announced that current COO Mark Hershey will take over as CEO from Vic Grizzle, effective April 1, 2026. Under Grizzle's decade-long leadership, the company's market capitalization has almost quadrupled since 2016. Hershey, who has been instrumental in the company's strategic growth and led 14 acquisitions, is set to continue advancing Armstrong's market competitiveness and growth strategy.

feed.title: Wearable Devices schedules special shareholder meeting for February 19
feed.summary: Wearable Devices Ltd. (NASDAQ:WLDS) has announced a Special General Meeting of Shareholders to be held on February 19, 2026. Only shareholders of record by January 22, 2026, will be eligible to vote. Further details of the agenda were not disclosed in the initial announcement, which was filed with the SEC.

feed.title: State Street to cover ETFs, tokenized deposits, stablecoins in new digital platform
feed.summary: State Street is launching a new digital asset platform on January 15, 2026, to expand its offerings into tokenized products like ETFs, MMFs, and regulated stablecoins. This initiative aims to bridge traditional finance with digital finance by providing secure infrastructure, wallet management, custodial services, and compliance controls for institutional clients. Additionally, an arm of State Street recently partnered with Galaxy Digital to introduce a tokenized private liquidity fund designed for 24/7 liquidity and instant redemptions using PYUSD.

feed.title: Emerson Electric (NYSE:EMR) Given New $150.00 Price Target at Jefferies Financial Group
feed.summary: Jefferies Financial Group has raised its price target for Emerson Electric (NYSE:EMR) to $150.00 from $145.00, maintaining a "hold" rating despite a potential upside of 1.44%. This aligns with a "Moderate Buy" consensus and an average target of $152.35 from other analysts. The report also highlights Emerson's recent earnings, which matched EPS estimates but slightly missed on revenue, and details insider transactions and institutional holdings.

feed.title: Lobbying Update: $60,000 of CARDINAL HEALTH INC. lobbying was just disclosed
feed.summary: A new disclosure reveals that CARDINAL HEALTH INC. lobbied for $60,000 in Q4 2025 on issues affecting the healthcare industry, including drug pricing and workforce shortages. The article also details congressional stock trading activity for CAH, insider trading by executives, hedge fund movements, and recent analyst ratings and price targets for the company.

feed.title: Alphabet director Hennessy sells $202k in stock
feed.summary: Alphabet director John L. Hennessy, through a trust, sold 508 shares of Class A Common Stock for over $202,000 on January 13, 2026. This transaction reduced his trust's direct holdings to 21,224 shares, with additional holdings in various Class C Google stock units and capital stock. The sale comes amidst positive analyst outlooks for Alphabet, including increased price targets and expectations of strong top-line growth driven by AI integration and robust search momentum.

feed.title: PENN Entertainment Inc (PENN) Shares Up 4.7% on Jan 15
feed.summary: Shares of PENN Entertainment Inc (PENN) rose 4.70% on January 15, closing at $14.49. This price is 37.22% below its 52-week high and 9.41% above its 52-week low. Wall Street analysts forecast an average target price of $19.35, implying a 33.56% upside from the current price, with a consensus "Outperform" recommendation.

feed.title: This W&T Offshore Insider Increased Their Holding In The Last Year
feed.summary: Insiders at W&T Offshore (NYSE:WTI) have been net buyers over the last year, with Founder Tracy Krohn making the largest purchase for US$527k. This indicates continued confidence in the company's future, as the shares were bought close to the current trading price. Insiders collectively own 34% of the company, suggesting alignment with other shareholders despite no recent transactions in the last three months.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (WAFD) WaFd, Inc. Posts Q1 Adjusted EPS $0.75 per Share, vs. FactSet Est of $0.76
feed.summary: WaFd, Inc. (WAFD) announced its Q1 adjusted EPS of $0.75 per share, which fell slightly below FactSet's estimated $0.76 per share. The report was published on January 15, 2026, and indicates the company's financial performance for the first fiscal quarter.

feed.title: Gap Inc. Names Paramount Exec Pamela Kaufman EVP, Chief Entertainment Officer
feed.summary: Gap Inc. has appointed Pamela Kaufman, a former Paramount executive, as its Executive Vice President and Chief Entertainment Officer, a new role designed to integrate the retailer more deeply into entertainment. She will report to CEO Richard Dickson, leading the company's "Fashiontainment" platform to scale content and licensing across various entertainment sectors and cultural collaborations. This move aims to leverage entertainment to create brand fandoms and drive growth for Gap Inc.'s portfolio.

feed.title: Why Alto Ingredients Remains Unprofitable Despite Market Leadership
feed.summary: Alto Ingredients (ALTO), a market leader in specialty alcohols and renewable fuels, continues to face profitability challenges due to commodity price sensitivity, high debt, and asset impairment charges. Despite ongoing losses since 2022, the company is implementing a turnaround strategy focused on cost streamlining, exiting unprofitable activities, and leveraging the Section 45Z clean fuel tax credit. Alto Ingredients is also expanding carbon dioxide capture to create new revenue streams and improve sustainability.

feed.title: Release according to Article 40, Section 1 of the WpHG
feed.summary: This article provides a release from QIAGEN N.V. regarding a voting rights announcement made by the AFM. The notification details transactions and holdings involving Goldman Sachs Group Inc., The, and other related entities, outlining their direct and indirect capital interests and voting rights in QIAGEN N.V. The reported transaction date is January 12, 2026.

feed.title: SLM CORPORATION (NASDAQ: SLM) SHAREHOLDER ALERT Bernstein Liebhard LLP Reminds SLM Corporation Investors of Upcoming Deadline
feed.summary: Bernstein Liebhard LLP has issued a shareholder alert for SLM Corporation (NASDAQ: SLM) investors, reminding them of an upcoming deadline in a securities fraud class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that SLM Corporation, also known as Sallie Mae, made misrepresentations regarding its loss mitigation and loan modification programs, as well as the stability of its private education loan delinquency rates between July 25, 2025, and August 14, 2025. Investors who purchased shares during this period and suffered losses are encouraged to contact the law firm to discuss their legal options and the process of becoming a lead plaintiff.

feed.title: Why Paccar (PCAR) Outpaced the Stock Market Today
feed.summary: Paccar (PCAR) outperformed the general market today, with its stock price increasing by 2.45% compared to the S&P 500's 0.26% gain. Over the past month, PCAR has seen a 6.6% increase, significantly outpacing its sector and the broader market. Investors are now looking forward to the company's upcoming earnings report on January 27, 2026, which is projected to show a decrease in EPS and revenue year-over-year.

feed.title: Netflix stock rating reiterated as Neutral by Monness ahead of Q4 results
feed.summary: Monness, Crespi, Hardt has reiterated a Neutral rating on Netflix (NASDAQ:NFLX) ahead of its Q4 2025 earnings report. The firm expects Netflix to meet its Q4 revenue and EPS targets, despite the stock underperforming its peer group in 2025. The article also highlights an ongoing acquisition battle for Warner Bros. between Netflix and Paramount Skydance, with Netflix reportedly considering an all-cash offer.

feed.title: Lobbying Update: $60,000 of LAM RESEARCH CORPORATION lobbying was just disclosed
feed.summary: LAM RESEARCH CORPORATION disclosed $60,000 in lobbying expenses for Q4 2025, focusing on semiconductor industry advocacy. The article also details recent congressional stock trading activities for LRCX, with more sales than purchases, and insider trading where top executives predominantly sold shares. Additionally, it highlights hedge fund activity, analyst ratings, and price targets for LRCX, indicating significant institutional investment shifts and mostly positive analyst sentiment.

feed.title: Damages debate heats up in FirstEnergy and Boeing securities battles
feed.summary: Two ongoing shareholder class-action lawsuits against FirstEnergy and Boeing could significantly impact the landscape of securities litigation. The cases hinge on how accurately plaintiffs must define their damages methodology at the class certification stage, particularly in light of a decade-old Supreme Court ruling. The outcomes, especially regarding the appeals courts' stance on "rigorous analysis" of damages, could make it much harder for investors to pursue class actions.

feed.title: American Tower (AMT) Exceeds Market Returns: Some Facts to Consider
feed.summary: American Tower (AMT) outperformed the broader market, closing up 2.29% against the S&P 500's 0.26% gain. Despite a recent monthly dip, the company is projected to announce strong earnings with estimated EPS growth of 9.48% and revenue increase of 4.76% for the upcoming report. However, analysts have slightly decreased EPS estimates, leading to a Zacks Rank of #4 (Sell), and the stock appears to trade at a premium compared to its industry.

feed.title: Unlock New Cruise Rewards with Royal Caribbean Group Points Choice Loyalty Program
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Group has introduced a new "Points Choice" loyalty program, allowing travelers to earn points across its brands (Royal Caribbean, Celebrity Cruises, Silversea) and apply them to their preferred loyalty program. This program, available for sailings from January 30, 2026, enhances flexibility and maximizes the value of loyalty points, building on the success of their "Status Match" program. It empowers guests to customize their cruise experience and gain more control over their rewards.

feed.title: Alphabet director Hennessy sells $202k in stock By Investing.com
feed.summary: Alphabet Director John L. Hennessy, through a trust, sold 508 shares of Class A Common Stock for over $202,000 on January 13, 2026. Following this transaction, Hennessy's trust directly holds 21,224 shares of Alphabet Class A Common Stock, along with various Class C stock units and shares. This news comes amidst other developments for Alphabet, including increased stock price targets from analysts and strategic moves in AI and smartphone manufacturing.

feed.title: Kroger Health Reaches New Milestone in Prescription Drug Safety Program
feed.summary: Kroger Health announced a new milestone in its Prescription Drug Safety program, having reached over 250,000 students. The program, developed in partnership with Everfi, aims to educate high school students on the safe use, storage, and disposal of prescription medications. This initiative reflects Kroger Health's commitment to building healthier communities by empowering young people with knowledge to prevent drug misuse.

feed.title: Kroger Teams With Uber as Food Prices Pressure Consumers
feed.summary: Kroger has partnered with Uber, Uber Eats, and Postmates to offer same-day delivery from nearly 2,700 Kroger-owned stores across the country. This expansion of Kroger's digital footprint comes as consumers face pressure from rising food prices, with inflation impacting essential spending and influencing shopping habits. The collaboration aims to provide greater convenience and flexibility for customers seeking groceries and last-minute items.

feed.title: Intuit Announces Annual Stockholder Meeting
feed.summary: Intuit Inc. (Nasdaq: INTU) announced it will hold its annual stockholder meeting virtually on Thursday, January 22, at 8:00 AM Pacific time. CEO Sasan Goodarzi will review fiscal year 2025 results and discuss the company's growth strategy. The meeting will be webcast live on Intuit's investor relations website, with a replay available afterwards.

feed.title: Globe Life Inc. Announces Fourth Quarter 2025 Earnings Release and Conference Call
feed.summary: Globe Life Inc. will release its Fourth Quarter 2025 financial results after the market closes on Wednesday, February 4, 2026. The announcement will be followed by a live conference call on Thursday, February 5, 2026, at 11:00 am Eastern. Further financial information and replay options will be available on the company's investor relations website.

feed.title: Ford in Talks to Use BYD Batteries for Overseas Factories
feed.summary: Ford Motor Co. is reportedly in discussions with China's BYD Co. to potentially source batteries for hybrid vehicles destined for its overseas factories. BYD, recognized as the world's leading electric vehicle seller, is one of several battery suppliers Ford is engaging with, though a deal is not yet imminent.

feed.title: Hines files to split 63.8-acre Centene campus property in North Natomas into three lots
feed.summary: Hines, the developer of the Centene campus in North Natomas, has applied to divide the 63.8-acre property into three separate lots. This move suggests Hines may be exploring future development options for the site. The article highlights this as a significant commercial real estate development in Sacramento.

feed.title: (WPM) Technical Data (WPM:CA)
feed.summary: This article provides technical data for Wheaton Precious Metals Corp. (WPM:CA) as of January 15, 2026, including AI-generated trading signals and ratings. It suggests long-term buying opportunities and lists numerous recent articles related to WPM:CA's trading and investment analysis.

feed.title: Loyalty enhancement for Royal, Celebrity and Silversea guests
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Group is launching "Points Choice" in January 2026, a new loyalty program designed to offer guests greater flexibility across its Royal Caribbean International, Celebrity Cruises, and Silversea brands. This initiative allows guests to earn points on any of the three lines and then use those points with the brand where they see the most value, reinforcing a guest-focused loyalty ecosystem. Points Choice builds on the previously introduced Status Match program, further integrating the loyalty experience for travelers within the Royal Caribbean Group.
